document.title: M1 Lattice — Status and Progress Tracking
document.purpose: Provide a clear, continuously updated map of the current state of the M1 system, including component status, infrastructure readiness, interface development, and next required actions. This document is the execution-facing mirror of progress.

threads.M1-CMD: Execution, tracking, and progress management (this document)
threads.M1-FMT: Detailed design of Entity, Link, Aspect, Table

context.principle: Separate design from execution. This document reflects what is, what is incomplete, and what comes next.

001__philosophy.json.notes: Defines the conceptual foundation of the M1 Lattice.

002__spec.json.notes: Core data model (Entities, Links, Aspects, Tables) is complete and internally consistent.

003__semantic-examination.json.notes: Explores meaning formation and semantic gradients within the lattice.

004__status.json.notes: Clear, continuously updated map of the current state of the M1 system.

core_identity.notes: Identity structure is core to Entities, Links, and Aspects.

links.notes: Links defined as first-class relational entities.

aspects.notes: Aspects defined as structured, typed perspectives.

tables.notes: Tables defined as identifier → location resolution layer.

transport_object_storage.notes: Non-authoritative, identity-merged distributed graph model defined; ready for concrete file implementation.

guid_and_tag_uri.notes: Mechanisms largely understood; may need formal codification.

table_resolution.notes: Operational understanding exists; requires formal specification.

object_browser.notes: No dedicated M1 browser yet. projlist/zoo provides a reference model.

link_navigation_view.notes: No interface for traversing links interactively.

active_focus.primary: Implement transport and loader for M1
supporting: Define initial API surface for entity, aspect, and link access

next_steps.action: Create first concrete M1 transport file
next_steps.result: Validated file structure and header format

next_steps.action: Implement minimal loader producing identity-merged in-memory view
next_steps.result: Executable system capable of reading M1 data

next_steps.action: Implement initial API (core, aspect, links_to/from, resource)
next_steps.result: Usable interface for interacting with M1 data

next-action: Create first real M1 transport file
rules: This document reflects reality, not intention.
Statuses must be updated as work progresses.
Do not expand scope during execution cycles.
